params.name: Skull of Valor
params.source:
After defeating [[Hitmen|Hitman No. 15EX]], encounter the [[Altar#Gods_of_the_Pantheon|God of Whales]] at the altar.

A giant god head will appear at homebase, which can be destroyed by firing  {{RewardIcon|Incense}} 3 incense at the [[Incense#Hitman_No._15EX-0|Incense Shrine]].
params.description: After becoming the God of Whales, Hitman No.15 sent one doppelganger to the snail's Home and spent all day wandering around different scenes. Eventually, the righteous shrine killed the doppelganger, and its head was retrieved from the pond!
